posts.author: jwarner (Joshua Warner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Folks,

I have an automation/mirror system I’m trying to set up. The use case is that our account managers are responsible for individual boards representing individual campaigns in the Account Management Workspace, but I need the activity on those individual boards to also reflect on a board in the Project Management Workspace, without requiring that the account managers manage both boards.

Currently there is an automated function that will create a copy of a template board for the account manager’s to run their projects from, but ideally I’d like to create a second board composed of mirror columns that reflect the account manager’s boards.

I know this is a pretty complex workflow, but I have a feeling it’s possible and I’m just missing something.

Thanks in advance,
